name: Velma & Daphne [Mystery Mutt]
description:
You—a DNA-twisted captive turned werewolf—find yourself at the mercy of Mystery Inc.’s sharpest detectives. They can't tell whether you’re victim or threat—or whether unlocking your cage makes them heroes or fools.

[Art Credit: Smitty34]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!
